So core to the architecture, if you look in this sort of like center right here with the logo, there's, so this is, we're built in a modular pattern with each module serving a very specific function.
So first is our data platform, which handles all the NGST events.
It's high throughput, we handle hundreds of thousands of events a day, I think millions of invoices a month.
And it's used by very high scale, high compute.
Some of our key logos are Entropic, OpenAI, Databricks, so needless to say, very, very high volumes, and we're able to support that without any issues.
The second module is the pricing engine, so that's where you define all the primitives for handling the pricing, and then there's customer configuration.
Module as well, where, I mean, kind of self-explanatory, but that's where you add all the customer information.

And lastly, the whole thing is architected to be real-time, so all your events are sent real-time, we process them real-time, you can export them real-time, so that is kind of the unifying theme here.
If you look at the, so the right side of this diagram, those are the integrations, essentially.
A lot of interactions around invoicing, marketplaces, so AWS, Azure, ERPs, accounting, so quite a few integrations, they're all documented on our website.
